steps.title: Analyze the equation
steps.content: Set each factor of $\left(52\right)(x^3+64)(x^4-81)=0$ to zero. From $x^3=-64$ we get $x=-4$; from $x^4=81$ we get $x=\pm 3$ (the other two roots are non-real).

steps.title: Count the solutions
steps.content: The distinct real solutions are $-4,\ 3,\ -3$ — exactly three. That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
